'''dhangoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zabiba|zabiba]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zabiba|zabiba]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhangoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhængeheth|dhængeheth]] || [[word:dhængehej|dhængehej]] || [[word:dhængehesh|dhængehesh]] || [[word:dhængehe|dhængehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhangongohoth|dhangongohoth]] || [[word:dhangongohoj|dhangongohoj]] || [[word:dhangongohosh|dhangongohosh]] || [[word:dhangongoho|dhangongoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhangohoth|dhangohoth]] || [[word:dhangohoj|dhangohoj]] || [[word:dhangohosh|dhangohosh]] || [[word:dhangoho|dhangoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhangofhoth|dhangofhoth]] || [[word:dhangofhoj|dhangofhoj]] || [[word:dhangofhosh|dhangofhosh]] || [[word:dhangofhof|dhangofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhangohotho|dhangohotho]] || [[word:dhangohojo|dhangohojo]] || [[word:dhangohosho|dhangohosho]] || [[word:dhangohoko|dhangohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhangohoth|dhangohoth]] || [[word:dhangohoj|dhangohoj]] || [[word:dhangohosh|dhangohosh]] || [[word:dhangoho|dhangoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhangohothol|dhangohothol]] || [[word:dhangohojol|dhangohojol]] || [[word:dhangohoshol|dhangohoshol]] || [[word:dhangohokol|dhangohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhangohothotho|dhangohothotho]] || [[word:dhangohojojo|dhangohojojo]] || [[word:dhangohoshosho|dhangohoshosho]] || [[word:dhangohoko|dhangohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhangohothon|dhangohothon]] || [[word:dhangohojon|dhangohojon]] || [[word:dhangohoshon|dhangohoshon]] || [[word:dhangohokon|dhangohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhangohothoro|dhangohothoro]] || [[word:dhangohojoro|dhangohojoro]] || [[word:dhangohoshoro|dhangohoshoro]] || [[word:dhangohokoro|dhangohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
